overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian-style clothing walking through a desert canyon at night. The character traverses a sandy path between rocky cliff formations under a starry sky, with smooth camera movement following from behind.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert canyon at night, following the sandy path between rock formations

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
rocky hillside terrain on the right side of the trail
sandy desert path winding through the canyon
distant rocky mountains visible at the end of the canyon
dark blue night sky with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy trail through a desert canyon at night, flanked by rocky walls on both sides. The starry sky is visible overhead as the character moves steadily forward toward distant mountain formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with close cliff walls

events.description: path curves slightly to the right as the canyon narrows

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing canyon passage with the left cliff wall drawing very close

entered.detail: opening in the canyon walls visible in the distance ahead
distinctive rock formation protruding from the right slope

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows significantly as the character progresses, with the left cliff wall looming close and the path curving slightly. The distant view shifts to show a canyon opening ahead, while the right side features a prominent rocky outcrop.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the opening of the canyon as the terrain begins to widen ahead

entered.detail: rocky mountain pass visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The canyon begins to open up as the character approaches a wider valley area. The left cliff wall recedes into the distance while the right slope draws closer to the trail, with a rocky mountain pass visible far ahead under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually expands into a wide mountain valley under a starry night sky. It begins with the character walking along a sandy trail flanked by towering rocky walls, moving steadily toward distant mountain formations. As the character progresses, the canyon narrows significantly, causing the left cliff wall to loom closer while the path curves toward a distant opening. The scene then shifts as the canyon begins to open up, with the left wall receding into the distance and the right slope drawing closer to the trail. Finally, the view expands across a wider valley area, revealing a rocky mountain pass far ahead beneath the clear, star-filled sky.
